summary: Iteration 5 (v2.3) testing for Alyssa Driver Checkpoint: 5-slot initial photo (drop bbm) + premium full-screen NameStep → forced SOPStep → Dashboard flow. Backend: 42/42 pytest passed (37 regression + 5 new iter-5). Frontend: All 3 step-by-step flows verified at 414w mobile viewport — NameStep, SOPStep, Dashboard rendering, navigation, Enter-key submit, empty-name toast, no-skip SOP, Baca Ulang modal — ALL PASS.

issues: Helper text below initial photos still reads 'Lengkapi 6 foto di atas' (line 556) and section comment '6 foto wajib' (line 510) and TahapCard note 'Upload 6 foto kendaraan awal' (line 704). Should be updated to '5 foto' to match v2.3 5-slot redesign. Counter pill itself shows correct '0/5'.

action_items: (Minor copy fix) Update 3 occurrences of '6 foto' → '5 foto' in /app/frontend/src/DriverCheckpoint.jsx (lines 510 comment, 556 helper note, 704 TahapCard note) so dashboard text matches the new 5-slot rule.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend v2.3 correctly drops 'bbm' from VALID_SLOTS and gates cair tahap 1 on len(initial_photos) >= 5 with proper Indonesian error message 'Lengkapi 5 foto awal dulu' (verified test_37).
public_trip progress.initial_complete threshold updated to >=5 (verified test_38).

Frontend NameStep → SOPStep → Dashboard flow is properly forced: SOPStep has NO close/X button (verified — sop_has_close_btn=False); driver cannot skip to dashboard without tapping 'Saya Sudah Baca & Setuju'.

Logo SVG (golf flag) renders inside NameStep; brand 'ALYSSA LOGISTIK', greeting 'Halo Driver!', label 'NAMA LENGKAP', placeholder 'Nama sesuai KTP', green 'Lanjut →' button, footer 'Data rekening akan diisi oleh admin', and UNIT pill 'B 9999 ZZ' all render correctly.

SOPStep banner shows ⚠️ 'WAJIB BACA SEBELUM JALAN!' + '7 PERINTAH DRIVER ALYSSA', all 7 expected titles present (CEK FISIK / FOTO UNIT / UPDATE FOTO JALUR / ATURAN KABIN / PENAMPILAN / ATURAN FINISH / DOKUMEN AMAN), DARURAT gold box with '0818 631 135', and CTA button 'Saya Sudah Baca & Setuju' — visual contrast is good (white text on red banner, white on dark cards).

Dashboard renders correctly with header 'NOMOR POLISI / B 9999 ZZ / AVANZA / Halo, Tester V23', SOP pill '✓ Sudah Dibaca', 'Baca Ulang SOP' button that re-opens SOP modal with btn-sop-ok available (verified sop_modal_reopens=True), 5 slot tiles (Tampak Depan/Belakang, Sisi Kiri/Kanan, Dashboard/Spidometer) — NO 'bbm' slot visible.
Enter-key on name input submits successfully (verified — drv-sop-screen appears after Enter without clicking Lanjut).
Empty-name + Lanjut shows toast 'Isi nama dulu ya' (verified empty_name_toast=True).
Minor inconsistency: dashboard helper note still uses '6 foto' wording (3 locations) although section pill shows '0/5'. Cosmetic, not functional.

DriverCheckpoint.jsx remains large (~800 lines with new step components); consider extracting NameStep, SOPStep, and AAlyssaLogo into separate files for maintainability (carryover from iter-4 review).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_driver_checkpoint.py (test_08 now uses 5 slots; test_23 5 slots; test_25 5 slots; added test_36..test_40 for v2.3 — bbm rejection, 5-slot cair gate, public progress, legacy read, FE seed trip)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 steps pass + all required testids present + visual checks pass)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: TRIP-V23-FE seeded via test_40 (nopol 'B 9999 ZZ', route 'Jakarta - Medan', tipe 'AVANZA', rangka 'ABC123', t1 500000). Plus TRIP-I5-*, TRIP-GATE5-*, TRIP-PUB5-*, TRIP-LEG5-*, TRIP-NOHOOK-*, TRIP-HOV-*, TRIP-CAIR-*, TRIP-I4-*. All readable via GET/public.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.3 = 5-slot initial photo (depan/belakang/kiri/kanan/spidometer — bbm DROPPED). Public threshold for initial_complete is >=5. Frontend has 3-screen forced flow: NameStep (drv-name-screen) → SOPStep (drv-sop-screen, NO skip) → Dashboard (drv-root). Key testids: input-nama, btn-save-nama, btn-sop-ok, drv-step-nopol. Seed trip TRIP-V23-FE is ready. To re-test FE NameStep, clear localStorage before navigating to URL (otherwise name persists and skips to SOP or dashboard). Backend regression suite now has 42 tests, all passing.
rca of the issue: Only minor cosmetic finding: stale '6 foto' literal in 3 lines of DriverCheckpoint.jsx (510 comment, 556 helper note, 704 TahapCard note). Counter pill correctly shows '0/5'. Recommend simple search/replace '6 foto' → '5 foto' in those 3 lines. No functional bug found.
